languages.text: "Коллега, я фиксирую прискорбные пробелы в твоих познаниях, которые свято-диагностика этого ксенообъекта не смогла бы восполнить. Однако, если ты дозволишь, я готов транслировать тебе часть своей премудрости, если ты дашь соответствующие инфообеты".

"Colleague, I register regrettable lacunae in your knowledge which the sacred diagnostics of this xeno-object are unlikely to ever complete. However, if you will permit it, I stand ready to transmit a portion of my wisdom to you, provided you swear the appropriate data-vows."
languages.original_text: "Коллега, я фиксирую прискорбные пробелы в твоих познаниях, которые свято-диагностика этого ксенообъекта не смогла бы восполнить. Однако, если ты дозволишь, я готов транслировать тебе часть своей премудрости, если ты дашь соответствующие инфообеты".

traits.locale_text: "Colleague, I register regrettable lacunae in your understanding, voids which the sacred diagnostics of this xeno-object could never hope to fill. Yet, if you will permit it, I stand ready to transmit a portion of my wisdom to you, provided you swear the appropriate info-oaths."

"Colleague, I register regrettable lacunae in your understanding, voids which the sacred diagnostics of this xeno-object could never hope to fill. Yet, if you will permit it, I stand ready to transmit a portion of my wisdom to you, provided you swear the appropriate info-oaths."

languages.text: "{mf|Kollege|Kollegin}, ich registriere bedauerliche Lakunen in Eurem Wissen, die die heiligen Diagnosen dieses Xeno-Objektes vermutlich nicht schließen können. Wenn Ihr gestattet, stehe ich allerdings bereit, um einen Teil meiner Weisheit auf Euch zu übertragen, sofern Ihr die entsprechenden Datenschwüre ablegt."
languages.original_text: "Colleague, I register regrettable lacunae in your knowledge which the sacred diagnostics of this xeno-object are unlikely to ever complete. However, if you will permit it, I stand ready to transmit a portion of my wisdom to you, provided you swear the appropriate data-vows."

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Kollege|Kollegin}, ich registriere bedauerliche Lakunen in Eurem Wissen, die die heiligen Diagnosen dieses Xeno-Objektes vermutlich nicht schließen können. Wenn Ihr gestattet, stehe ich allerdings bereit, um einen Teil meiner Weisheit auf Euch zu übertragen, sofern Ihr die entsprechenden Datenschwüre ablegt."

languages.text: “同僚，我检测到你的知识体系里存在令人遗憾的空白，而对这个异形造物的神圣诊断恐怕也无法填补它们。不过，如果你允许的话，我愿意向你传输我的一部分智慧，但你需要立下相应的信息誓约。”
languages.original_text: "Colleague, I register regrettable lacunae in your knowledge which the sacred diagnostics of this xeno-object are unlikely to ever complete. However, if you will permit it, I stand ready to transmit a portion of my wisdom to you, provided you swear the appropriate data-vows."

traits.locale_text: “同僚，我检测到你的知识体系里存在令人遗憾的空白，而对这个异形造物的神圣诊断恐怕也无法填补它们。不过，如果你允许的话，我愿意向你传输我的一部分智慧，但你需要立下相应的信息誓约。”

languages.text: « Cher collègue, je constate de terribles lacunes dans vos connaissances que les diagnostics sacrés de ce xéno-objet ne sauraient combler. Toutefois, si vous le permettez, je suis prêt à vous transmettre une fraction de mes connaissances, si vous prêtez les serments numériques de circonstance. »
languages.original_text: "Colleague, I register regrettable lacunae in your knowledge which the sacred diagnostics of this xeno-object are unlikely to ever complete. However, if you will permit it, I stand ready to transmit a portion of my wisdom to you, provided you swear the appropriate data-vows."

traits.locale_text: « Cher collègue, je constate de terribles lacunes dans vos connaissances que les diagnostics sacrés de ce xéno-objet ne sauraient combler. Toutefois, si vous le permettez, je suis prêt à vous transmettre une fraction de mes connaissances, si vous prêtez les serments numériques de circonstance. »

languages.text: «Estimado colega, lamento informarte de que registro lagunas en tus conocimientos que los sagrados diagnósticos de este artefacto xenos tienen pocas probabilidades de completar. No obstante, si me lo permites, estoy dispuesto a transmitirte una parte de mi sabiduría, siempre y cuando prestes los debidos juramentos de datos».
languages.original_text: "Colleague, I register regrettable lacunae in your knowledge which the sacred diagnostics of this xeno-object are unlikely to ever complete. However, if you will permit it, I stand ready to transmit a portion of my wisdom to you, provided you swear the appropriate data-vows."

traits.locale_text: «Estimado colega, lamento informarte de que registro lagunas en tus conocimientos que los sagrados diagnósticos de este artefacto xenos tienen pocas probabilidades de completar. No obstante, si me lo permites, estoy dispuesto a transmitirte una parte de mi sabiduría, siempre y cuando prestes los debidos juramentos de datos».

languages.text: "Meslektaşım, irfanında bu zeno nesnenin kutsal teşhislerinin tamamlaması pek olası olmayan üzücü boşluklar kaydediyorum. Ancak izin verirsen uygun veri yeminlerini etmen şartıyla bilgeliğimin bir kısmını sana aktarmaya hazırım."
languages.original_text: "Colleague, I register regrettable lacunae in your knowledge which the sacred diagnostics of this xeno-object are unlikely to ever complete. However, if you will permit it, I stand ready to transmit a portion of my wisdom to you, provided you swear the appropriate data-vows."

traits.locale_text: "Meslektaşım, irfanında bu zeno nesnenin kutsal teşhislerinin tamamlaması pek olası olmayan üzücü boşluklar kaydediyorum. Ancak izin verirsen uygun veri yeminlerini etmen şartıyla bilgeliğimin bir kısmını sana aktarmaya hazırım."

languages.text: 「同僚殿、あなたの知識には遺憾な空隙が見受けられます。このゼノ・オブジェクトの神聖な診断をもってしても、それが埋まることはおそらくないでしょう。しかし、お許しいただけるなら、しかるべきデータ誓約を立てていただくことを条件に、私の叡智の一部を伝授する用意があります」
languages.original_text: "Colleague, I register regrettable lacunae in your knowledge which the sacred diagnostics of this xeno-object are unlikely to ever complete. However, if you will permit it, I stand ready to transmit a portion of my wisdom to you, provided you swear the appropriate data-vows."

traits.locale_text: 「同僚殿、あなたの知識には遺憾な空隙が見受けられます。このゼノ・オブジェクトの神聖な診断をもってしても、それが埋まることはおそらくないでしょう。しかし、お許しいただけるなら、しかるべきデータ誓約を立てていただくことを条件に、私の叡智の一部を伝授する用意があります」
